"cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-321", "name": "Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-798", "name": "Use of Hard-coded Credentials"}], "description": "### Impact 
Hardcoded DNS key usage has been found in Netmaker allowing unauth users to interact with DNS API endpoints.

### Patches
Issue is patched in 0.17.1, and fixed in 0.18.6+. 

If Users are using 0.17.1, they should run "docker pull gravitl/netmaker:v0.17.1" and "docker-compose up -d". This will switch them to the patched users

If users are using v0.18.0-0.18.5, they should upgrade to v0.18.6 or later.

### Workarounds
If using 0.17.1, can just pull the latest docker image of backend and restart server.

### References
Credit to Project Discovery, and in particular https://github.com/rootxharsh , https://github.com/iamnoooob, and https://github.com/projectdiscovery", "epss": {"percentage": 0.03147, "percentile": 0.86266}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx", "github_reviewed_at": "2023-08-25T18:38:18Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2023-32077"}], "nvd_published_at": "2023-08-24T22:15:08Z", "published_at": "2023-08-25T18:38:18Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/security/advisories/GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2023-32077", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/pull/2170", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/commit/1621c27c1d176b639e9768b2acad7693e387fd51", "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker/commit/9362c39a9a822f0e07361aa7c77af2610597e657", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gravitl/netmaker/security-advisories/GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gravitl/netmaker", "summary": "Netmaker has Hardcoded DNS Secret Key", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T16:06:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8x8h-hcq8-jwwx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.17.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gravitl/netmaker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.17.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.18.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gravitl/netmaker"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.18.0, < 0.18.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Netmaker has Hardcoded DNS Secret Key
